purpose: Console identity, organization, membership, role, Sub2API account mapping, and management API contract.
machineBoundary: Account, organization, membership, role, disabled status, Sub2API user mapping, and management API shape.

lifecycle.removalCondition: Replace only with a newer current contract for the same boundary.

account.sub2apiMapping: sub2apiUserId is a required positive integer and is the only spendable-balance identity.

workspaceOwnership.personalWorkspace: ownerAccountId identifies the Console owner and its Sub2API mapping.
workspaceOwnership.organizationWorkspace: ownerAccountId is organization.billingAccountId and the caller must have active membership.

identityProvisioning.atomicInvite: One successful POST /api/users atomically commits the mapped Account, normalized User, one deterministic default Organization, and the User's active Membership; any conflict commits none of the four facts.
identityProvisioning.defaultRole: An omitted role creates an owner User and owner Membership; explicit owner, admin, and member roles remain supported and the User and Membership roles match.
identityProvisioning.existingBoundaryCompatibility: An existing Account is accepted only when its positive Sub2API mapping matches or is not yet assigned; an existing default Organization is accepted only when its billingAccountId matches.

identitySecurity.email: Create and bootstrap normalize email with lower(trim(email)); normalized email is unique in PostgreSQL and legacy blank or colliding values fail migration closed.
identitySecurity.passwordPolicy: Create, reset, and bootstrap plaintext passwords require at least 12 characters; bootstrap passwordHash values are accepted without guessing plaintext strength.
identitySecurity.secretProjection: Passwords and password hashes are excluded from browser responses and audit facts.

bootstrapLifecycle.userState: A matching disabled or deleted User is never reactivated and its lifecycle metadata is preserved across startup.
bootstrapLifecycle.membershipState: A revoked or otherwise non-active matching Membership is never replaced with an active Membership, and a non-active User never receives an active Membership.

userLifecycle.sessionPolicy: Disabling or deleting a User revokes that User's sessions.
userLifecycle.ownerRenewalPolicy: Disabling or deleting an owner turns off current Control Plane compute and storage autoRenew intent for that Account without deleting provider resources; non-owner lifecycle changes do not alter Account renewal intent.

operatorNotifications.source: Derived from current Workspace renewal operations plus current compute and storage compatibility state; no alert table or second source of truth.
operatorNotifications.logPolicy: State transitions use stable codes and hashed resource references; account IDs, resource IDs, redeem codes, balances, credentials, and provider errors are excluded.
